title: anomalanthus parviflorus
intro: Anomalanthus parviflorus, also known as the Dwarf Anomalon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Anomalanthus parviflorus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
